scope_note: QA Celestial Nav Cert family [165]: certifies celestial navigation sight reduction as rational trigonometry. sin²(altitude) = [σ₁√(s_φ·s_δ) + σ₂√(c_φ·c_δ·c_LHA)]² where σ₁,σ₂ ∈ {-1,+1} are discrete hemisphere/quadrant orientation flags. Sextant measures sin²(altitude) = spread directly. Position circle = spread locus. Two-star fix = intersection of spread equations. Theorem NT: continuous angles → spreads + discrete σ flags → algebraic fix. 7 star witnesses verified against classical. Tier 1 exact reformulation.
